summary: Tested two features: (1) FormSchemaBuilder helper_text/tooltip_text fields in the intake form builder, and (2) Product store QuestionLabel using Shadcn Tooltip instead of native browser title attribute. All primary tests passed. Helper text and tooltip persistence confirmed via both UI and direct API response.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test helper_text rendering live via /intake-form — returns 403 for admin user (camayankjain96@gmail.com is a customer, not the admin). Code review confirms HelperText component is wired correctly in UniversalFormRenderer.tsx

passed_tests: Login as mayank@automateaccounts.com with partner code 'aa' - SUCCESS
Navigate to Admin > Content > Intake Forms > Intake Form Builder tab - SUCCESS
Click Edit on 'Demo Onboarding Form' (pencil icon) - opens 'Edit Intake Form' modal - SUCCESS
Click gear icon (Settings2) on non-locked 'Business Type' field - field editor expands - SUCCESS
Helper text input found: data-testid='field-helper-q2', placeholder='e.g. Enter your date of birth' - SUCCESS
Tooltip input found: data-testid='field-tooltip-q2', placeholder='e.g. Must match your government ID' - SUCCESS
Fill helper_text='Select your business type from the list' and tooltip_text='This helps us tailor our services to your needs' - SUCCESS
Save Form button clicked - success toast appeared - SUCCESS
Reopen form and verify values persisted in UI - SUCCESS
API confirms persistence: business_type field has helper_text and tooltip_text saved in DB - SUCCESS
Navigate to product 'Sample Service1' at /product/d8b954f3-7f9f-409d-8657-a646ff785203 - SUCCESS
Info icon (ⓘ) visible next to Q1 * question label in Configure & Price section - SUCCESS
NO native title attribute on any element (0 elements found) - SUCCESS (confirms Shadcn used, not native)
Hover over Info icon - Shadcn Tooltip popup appears with text 'TT1' - SUCCESS
Tooltip confirmed via role='tooltip' and data-radix-popper-content-wrapper attributes - SUCCESS
action_items: Minor: UniversalFormRenderer.tsx - checkbox field type does NOT render FieldLabel with tooltip or HelperText, but FormSchemaBuilder allows setting helper_text/tooltip_text for checkboxes. Consider adding tooltip/helper text support for checkbox type for consistency.

Informational: /intake-form portal returns 403 for admin users — helper_text display in customer portal could not be live-tested but code review confirms HelperText component is wired in for all standard field types (text, textarea, select, file, number, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: UniversalFormRenderer.tsx: Checkbox type (lines 400-418) missing FieldLabel with tooltip prop and HelperText component. All other field types (text/email/tel/number/date/textarea/select/file) properly render both. Inconsistency since FormSchemaBuilder shows helper/tooltip inputs for checkbox type.
FormSchemaBuilder.tsx line 6: 'export { Info }' - unusual to export a lucide icon from a non-icon module. Not a bug but could be confusing.

The helper_text and tooltip inputs are correctly placed in the 'else' branch (only for non-address, non-terms, non-signature types). This correctly mirrors what UniversalFormRenderer supports rendering.
seed_data_creation: Set helper_text='Select your business type from the list' and tooltip_text='This helps us tailor our services to your needs' on the business_type field of Demo Onboarding Form (id: 21224411-e77c-4675-865b-58a4f3385ba0)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner code 'aa', admin: mayank@automateaccounts.com / ChangeMe123!. Demo Onboarding Form id: 21224411-e77c-4675-865b-58a4f3385ba0 now has helper_text and tooltip_text set on business_type field (q2). Product 'Sample Service1' (d8b954f3) has Q1 boolean question with tooltip_text='TT1'. All tooltip/helper text features verified working. Minor: checkbox type doesn't render tooltip/helper in UniversalFormRenderer.
rca_of_issues: N/A - all features are working correctly. The only limitation encountered was the /intake-form portal returns 403 for admin users, but the helper_text code is correctly implemented in UniversalFormRenderer.tsx (line 563 for text/input fields, line 371 for textarea, line 393 for select, line 458 for file) and confirmed stored in database.
